title: Exceptional Fee Discount
description:
An Exceptional Fee Discount is a product feature that temporarily or conditionally reduces or waives a specific fee associated with a product or service. It represents a non-standard adjustment to fees that overrides the usual product pricing rules, typically applied for targeted customers, campaigns, or special business events.


Examples:

- Waive the $10 monthly account maintenance fee for students at a partner university.

- Reduce international transfer fees by 50% for VIP clients during a campaign.

- Temporarily waive overdraft fees following a system outage.

DiscountType.description: A categorization of the mechanism used to reduce the cost of a product or service. Discount Type defines how a discount is applied, whether as a percentage, fixed amount, waived fee, or other special pricing arrangement. It helps standardize and configure the calculation of exceptional or promotional pricing.

x-relationships.description: Inherits from Exceptional Fee Product Feature
